basics.name: Pritom Paul
basics.summary: Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience in backend systems, industrial automation, and computer vision pipelines. Transitioning toward research in deep learning and applied computer vision.

highlights: Automated 10+ industrial workflows using Python, reducing manual effort by 100+ hours/month and improving accuracy by 40%.
Designed and developed scalable REST APIs in Django with optimized queries, caching, and robust testing.
Analyzed real-world operational data to identify inefficiencies and deliver targeted automation solutions.
Deployed containerized services using Docker and Nginx, and implemented CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions.
Mentored junior engineers in system design and development best practices.
Diagnosed and resolved 50+ ATM hardware/software issues across field deployments, improving uptime by 30%.
Collaborated with the Counterfeiting Department on hardware validation, reducing ATM failure rates by 25%.
Contributed to a CDM banknote classification pipeline covering 12+ condition classes with a 4-orientation feed.
Verified DAT classifications with physical samples and optimized NCR datasets, improving detection accuracy.
Mentored 15+ students under the Cambridge curriculum, with over 90% achieving A grades.
Focused on developing analytical thinking and structured problem-solving skills.

portfolio.name: AlterBot
portfolio.description: Garment industry workflow automation system. Reduced manual labor by 80%, saving 100+ hours weekly. Built with Python, Django, Playwright, Selenium, Docker, Svelte, PostgreSQL.

portfolio.name: AlterEye
portfolio.description: Real-time multi-camera vision system for industrial monitoring. Built detection pipelines with YOLO and scalable data flow using MQTT and Redis. Built with Python, GStreamer, YOLO, MQTT, Redis.

portfolio.name: Technomedia Call Management System (TCMS)
portfolio.description: Full-stack web system for tracking ATM service requests, engineer assignments, and call logs. Built with PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML/CSS.

portfolio.name: Fish Detection and Dataset Development
portfolio.description: Ongoing research project. Collecting and curating a real-world fish image dataset for detection tasks. Building object detection models using YOLO. Planned research publication. Built with Python, YOLO, Computer Vision.
